staff.name: Ma. Teresa R. Santos
staff.bio: Ms. Santos has been shaping young minds at MMPNS for over 15 years. Known for her innovative hands-on science experiments, she has led multiple students to regional science fair victories. Her classroom is a laboratory of curiosity where every child is encouraged to question, explore, and discover.
staff.education: B.S. Elementary Education, Major in General Science — Philippine Normal University
staff.motto: Every child is a scientist waiting to be awakened.
